description: A single, complete unit of language that carries a seed of meaning. It is understood as a powerful vessel that can create and transform reality when spoken with intention.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'tho' (a whole system/context) and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'a whole context made open.' This beautifully frames a single word as a seed that contains and opens up an entire field of meaning. The sound is solid yet expansive.
